posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, please advise how can I set below workflow:

  1. Creating dasboard,
  2. Placing widget,
    The question:
    I would like the widget by default show content according who is accesing in it.
    By now each member or guest after open the board need to choose manually Filter by person.
